preview:
Maya Chen: Heads-up — Aurelia Health renewal in ~45 days. We're seeing a ~60% drop in weekly API calls since Monday. Main technical POC (former CTO) left two weeks ago. AE mentioned a competitor trial. Need quick triage and an outreach plan. :eyes:
Jordan Lee: Confirmed. Had a 1:1 with their AE — procurement is talk...
text:
Maya Chen: Heads-up — Aurelia Health renewal in ~45 days. We're seeing a ~60% drop in weekly API calls since Monday. Main technical POC (former CTO) left two weeks ago. AE mentioned a competitor trial. Need quick triage and an outreach plan. :eyes:
Jordan Lee: Confirmed. Had a 1:1 with their AE — procurement is talking to Nimbus AI for a narrow use-case. Not full churn signal but seat activity is down, esp on the `reporting` endpoint. Dashboard: https://redwood.app/d/abc123/aurelia-usage
Ethan Park: Can you paste the query you used? I'll pull token-level metrics and error logs for the last 14 days.
Maya Chen: SQL I ran:```sql
SELECT date, SUM(api_calls) AS calls, SUM(errors) AS errs
FROM usage_events
WHERE customer = 'aurelia_health'
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 14;
```
Ethan Park: Pulled logs. Notes: generation calls down 63%, embeddings steady. Error rate rose 0.2% -> 1.5%...

title: #customer-success: 1746873210
preview: Ava Chen: :wave: Heads-up — onboarding intake for ~28 trial tenants in EMEA experienced delayed provisioning during yesterday's inference outage. Several have kickoff calls this week and a subset are in the 30-day renewal window. We need coordinated comms, renewal risk flags, and localized enablement. Proposed immed...
text:
Ava Chen: :wave: Heads-up — onboarding intake for ~28 trial tenants in EMEA experienced delayed provisioning during yesterday's inference outage. Several have kickoff calls this week and a subset are in the 30-day renewal window. We need coordinated comms, renewal risk flags, and localized enablement. Proposed immediate actions:
1) send a short status + mitigation note to affected tenants with a 2-week credit offer
2) schedule EMEA-friendly office hours for walkthroughs
3) tag renewals for AM outreach. @Miguel Torres @Priya Desai @Riley Patel please confirm.

Miguel Torres: :warning: SRE update — root cause was a KV cache invalidation triggered during an autoscaler bump. Services restored at 02:18 UTC. We'll have a full RCA by EOD. Impact window: 2026-03-15 22:42 UTC -> 2026-03-16 02:18 UTC. No data loss; symptoms were provisioning delays and failed onboarding jobs.

Priya Desai: Than...

title: #customer-success: 1746555302
preview:
Jasmine Liu: quick q as we roll PLG signals into HubSpot: when do we loop in CSMs, and how are we tagging the motion? specifically want a clean split between “existing customer expansion” vs “new self-serve conversion” so we don’t step on toes.

Rachel Kim: +1. for existing paid customers we need a heads-up before A...
text:
Jasmine Liu: quick q as we roll PLG signals into HubSpot: when do we loop in CSMs, and how are we tagging the motion? specifically want a clean split between “existing customer expansion” vs “new self-serve conversion” so we don’t step on toes.

Rachel Kim: +1. for existing paid customers we need a heads-up before AE outreach. even if it’s “good news” (usage spike), it can be tied to a rollout that’s currently fragile.

Markus Klein: also: reliability signals (429s/latency) can be either “upgrade time” or “they’re hurting”. if AE jumps in with a pitch, it reads tone deaf.

Isabelle Laurent: from ops side: we can encode this as a tag/property on the PLG Signal object + company. question is the definition.

Ben Carter: PRD intent was: classify signals + score them, then route with guardrails. but we didn’t fully define CS notification rules. let’s lock a v1.

Jasmine Liu: proposal for v...

text:
Maya Chen: Quick ask — can we do a rapid dump of post-onboarding friction points for the NeonPilot pilot? Need feature requests, pain descriptions, how it blocked them, and a suggested priority (low/med/high). Trying to get an exec-ready one-pager by tomorrow.
Ethan Park: +1. I have 3 notes from the onboarding call. Will paste in.
Ethan Park: 1) Setup flow: customers tripped on the API key rotation UI — wording unclear, thought key rotation would invalidate live tokens. Severity: high. Repro: go to Settings -> Keys -> rotate, dialog reads like a destructive action. Suggestion: add "does not invalidate live tokens" line and an inline FAQ link.
Ethan Park: 2) Embedding batch retry: when a large batch errors, the UI shows a generic "failed" with no itemized errors. Severity: medium. Repro: upload 5k vectors, one item exceeds size and whole job shows failed. Suggestion: itemized error row...

title: #customer-success: 1742100000
preview:
Priya Rao: @here onboarding customer Luca ran into 429s after switching from single-threaded calls to our Python SDK batch helper. Customer is blocked on finish of integration. Paste of error:

Luca Marino: "got HTTP 429 when posting to /v1/generate, no retry header"

Priya Rao: Logs show repeated 429s immediately a...
text:
Priya Rao: @here onboarding customer Luca ran into 429s after switching from single-threaded calls to our Python SDK batch helper. Customer is blocked on finish of integration. Paste of error:

Luca Marino: "got HTTP 429 when posting to /v1/generate, no retry header"

Priya Rao: Logs show repeated 429s immediately after they turned on parallel workers (8 -> 40). stack trace snippet:
```
requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: https://api.redwood.ai/v1/generate
 File "app.py", line 112, in call_model
 resp = client.generate(...)
```

Janelle Kim: Which SDK version and client config? Are they using the global token or per-process token? Also any proxy / NAT that could collapse connections?

Ethan Park: common causes: (1) concurrent workers exhausting per-key rate limit, (2) missing exponential backoff, (3) client re-creating new connections for each r...

title: #customer-success: 1741513319
preview:
Jamie Chen: quick q for the demo env folks — can we reuse the sales demo tenant to onboard a customer POC? (CS team has a prospect that wants to start testing this week and asked for “the environment you showed in the demo”).

Jamie Chen: specifically: can we just hand them a key + a project in the demo org, then sw...
text:
Jamie Chen: quick q for the demo env folks — can we reuse the sales demo tenant to onboard a customer POC? (CS team has a prospect that wants to start testing this week and asked for “the environment you showed in the demo”).

Jamie Chen: specifically: can we just hand them a key + a project in the demo org, then swap out later if they buy?

Markus Klein: pls don’t 🙏 demo tenant is “known-good / synthetic only” and we try to keep it isolated + stable for live demos.

Markus Klein: a few reasons:
- demo has seeded fake usage + synthetic traffic generator running (dashboards look realistic) — will pollute/complicate their POC measurement
- model pins + fallback policies are tuned for the demo story; we don’t want customer workflows coupled to that
- we rotate demo keys / reset state often. customers would get broken unexpectedly
- demo quotas/capacity are sized for parallel demos; a PO...

title: #customer-success: 1741220440
preview:
Kimberly Park: seeing a second account complain about tool calling JSON parse errors. Do we have an official workaround we can share?

Chloe Martin: Northwind CX has examples where args come back as plain text (not JSON). Ticket is SUP-1913.

Aisha Rahman: HelioPay had trailing comma invalid JSON when streaming (SUP...
text:
Kimberly Park: seeing a second account complain about tool calling JSON parse errors. Do we have an official workaround we can share?

Chloe Martin: Northwind CX has examples where args come back as plain text (not JSON). Ticket is SUP-1913.

Aisha Rahman: HelioPay had trailing comma invalid JSON when streaming (SUP-1842). We rolled back a flag in us-east but not sure if it covers all cases.

Ethan Park: Workaround: 1) move tool schema/instructions earlier in prompt 2) add explicit STRICT JSON instruction 3) if possible, allow one retry when validation fails. Also we can enable `tool_args_json_mode=strict` on a per-route basis.

Kimberly Park: can someone draft a one-pager for CS? want to avoid each CSM inventing guidance.

Aisha Rahman: Ill add to known-issues page and link it here.

Rachel Kim: Kicking off a thread to get aligned on burst beta customer comms + success criteria + escalation paths for the beta window. We’ve got a few customers onboarding starting next week and I want us to be crisp on what we tell them + what “good” looks like.

Maya Patel: Quick heads-up — starting onboarding for Helios Health (HLS-49). Goal: pilot traffic by 2024-06-28, production by 2024-07-19. Primary contacts: Ethan (Platform), Lena (Security), Dr. Ruiz (customer PM).

Ethan Zhou: tracked — thanks Maya. Can you paste the initial success criteria and any compliance must...
text:
Maya Patel: Quick heads-up — starting onboarding for Helios Health (HLS-49). Goal: pilot traffic by 2024-06-28, production by 2024-07-19. Primary contacts: Ethan (Platform), Lena (Security), Dr. Ruiz (customer PM).

Ethan Zhou: tracked — thanks Maya. Can you paste the initial success criteria and any compliance must-haves?

Maya Patel: 1) <50ms p95 for API responses under pilot load, 2) SSO via SAML + Okta, 3) Private VPC with no egress to public storage, 4) model version pinned to redwood-3b-v2 during pilot. Also need a short enablement for their SRE team.

Lena Ortiz: SAML Okta + VPC noted. Any PHI expected in requests? That changes our audit scope.

Maya Patel: They said no PHI in initial scope, but may expand later. For now treat as "sensitive PII" — we'll require audit logs and KMS integration.

Devon Hale: I'll own the Dedicated capacity sizing & initial infra layout. ETA for a ...

title: #customer-success: 1717509999
preview:
Priya Sharma: Quick ask — can we draft a tiny pulsecard micro-play for AEs to send to customers during week 1? Focus: prefill + small nudge that increases warm-pool hits. Need 2 templates (email & in-app), tracking tag, and a simple signal to mark "prefill success".
Diego Morales: +1. Do we want one for streaming-he...
text:
Priya Sharma: Quick ask — can we draft a tiny pulsecard micro-play for AEs to send to customers during week 1? Focus: prefill + small nudge that increases warm-pool hits. Need 2 templates (email & in-app), tracking tag, and a simple signal to mark "prefill success".
Diego Morales: +1. Do we want one for streaming-heavy customers and one for batch-only? Different cache guidance.
Ava Chen: yes — streaming: "start with 3 concurrent streams, enable prefix cache"; batch: "prefill 100 short prompts, TTL 24h". Keep wording non-technical for AEs.
Liam (CS Eng): Drafting now. Proposed in-app template: 'Hey [Name], we primed your workspace with a small set of examples to speed things up. Try <link>. If you see slow responses, reply here and we'll bump your warm pool.'
Priya Sharma: Perfect. Also include a small tracking tag: prefiller=cs_week1_nudge_v1, channel=email|inapp.
Ava Chen: Add fallba...
